description_long: This house complex consists of multiple modern, flat-roofed residential buildings arranged along intersecting streets, surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees. The structures are primarily white with large, rectangular forms and minimalistic design, featuring numerous windows and open courtyards. The site includes paved driveways, small garden plots, and several water features or pools adjacent to the buildings. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed along the perimeter and within the property, providing shade and visual separation. The overall layout is organized and geometric, with clear boundaries between the buildings, roads, and green spaces. The setting suggests a suburban neighborhood with a focus on privacy, outdoor living, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, multi-building residential complex with flat roofs, white facades, landscaped gardens, and geometric layout along intersecting streets.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the complex with two main buildings, visible driveways, water features, and lush landscaping along the street.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear and side of the buildings, emphasizing the long tree-lined street and the separation between the two main structures.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective from the back, showing the rear gardens, more trees, and the geometric arrangement of the buildings and roads.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, with a clear view of the main entryways, additional landscaping, and the overall symmetry of the site.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are minimalistic with flat doors, some featuring small overhangs or porches, and are accentuated by landscaping and paved paths.
